team.name: Marcus Echt
team.bio: 23 years in construction management. Built the company from a single crew to one of the Pacific Northwest's most trusted general contractors.

team.name: Dana Kroll
team.bio: Specialist in large-scale commercial builds. Responsible for project delivery, subcontractor relationships, and field operations across all active sites.

team.name: Theo Park
team.bio: Precision cost management since 2008. Theo's estimates are the foundation of our on-time, on-budget record across over 350 projects.
